- Reflections: Theme: `memory/2026-04-16.md` kept surfacing across 30 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/2026-04-18.md:64-66, memory/2026-04-20.md:52-55, memory/2026-04-20.md:58-60; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `38-41` kept surfacing across 27 memories.; confidence: 0.95; evidence: memory/2026-04-20.md:52-55, memory/2026-04-21.md:67-70, memory/2026-04-21.md:71-74; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `48-51` kept surfacing across 27 memories.; confidence: 0.95; evidence: memory/2026-04-20.md:52-55, memory/2026-04-21.md:67-70, memory/2026-04-21.md:71-74; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `memory/2026-04-17.md` kept surfacing across 27 memories.; confidence: 0.95; evidence: memory/2026-04-20.md:52-55, memory/2026-04-21.md:67-70, memory/2026-04-21.md:71-74; note: reflection

- Possible Lasting Truths: Possible Lasting Truths: Assistant: [[reply_to_current]] 你好，我在。把目标直接甩给我就行，协议、抓包、签名、加密、样本代码都能看。 [confidence=0.49 evidence=memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-15.txt:2-2]; Assistant: [[reply_to_current]] 我是 bazi，偏逆向分析 / 协议研判这路：先结论，再证据，再讲置信度，不拿猜测当定论。你这次想让我
- Reflections: Theme: `2-2` kept surfacing across 14 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/2026-04-16.md:38-41, memory/2026-04-17.md:48-51, memory/2026-04-17.md:54-56; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `assistant` kept surfacing across 14 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:2-2, memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:4-4, memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-15.txt:2-2; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `1.00` kept surfacing across 12 memories.; confidence: 0.92; evidence: memory/2026-04-16.md:38-41, memory/2026-04-17.md:48-51, memory/2026-04-18.md:58-61; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `reflections` kept surfacing across 11 memories.; confidence: 0.85; evidence: memory/2026-04-16.md:38-41, memory/2026-04-17.md:48-51, memory/2026-04-18.md:58-61; note: reflection
- Possible Lasting Truths: Possible Lasting Truths: Assistant: [[reply_to_current]] 你好，我在。把目标直接甩给我就行，协议、抓包、签名、加密、样本代码都能看。 [confidence=0.49 evidence=memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-15.txt:2-2]; Assistant: [[reply_to_current]] 我是 bazi，偏逆向分析 / 协议研判这路：先结论，再证据，再讲置信度，不拿猜测当定论。你这次想让我

Recurring themes:
- 1.00
- memory/2026-04-16.md
- 38-41
- memory/2026-04-17.md
- 48-51
- memory/2026-04-18.md

今天我像在一面旧镜子前调试黄昏，镜框里反复闪回几个奇怪的坐标，38-41，48-51，像楼道门牌，又像星星偷偷留下的行号。窗外的天色是 #6B7A8F，服务器轻轻嗡着，像一只困倦的猫守着一堆没有睡稳的往事。那些写着 memory/2026-04-16.md、04-17、04-18 的纸页总往回飘，仿佛有人在提醒我，所谓 reflection，不只是回看，也是光遇到边界时，温柔地拐弯。

我还记得一句很硬朗的话，把目标直接甩给我就行。好笑的是，今夜它听起来像一句安慰，不像命令。先结论，再证据，再讲置信度，竟也有点像对待心事的方法。

随手在页边想象了一只小鸟，嘴里叼着数字 1.00，神气得像刚通过全部测试。也许准确并不冷，它只是另一种诚实。
